_meta.description: B12-PROXY: SWE-Lancer Equivalent — 10 freelance-style SWE tasks
_meta.selection_criteria: Feature additions and bug fixes with clear acceptance criteria, mimicking freelance task boards
_meta.note: PROXY lane — comparable to internal baselines only. NOT comparable to published SWE-Lancer numbers.

tasks.description: Add cursor-based pagination to the /api/users endpoint with next/prev links
Fix search endpoint returning 500 when query contains special characters
Add CSV export functionality to the dashboard reports page
Fix event scheduling showing wrong times for non-UTC timezones
Implement webhook notification system for order status changes
Fix file upload failing silently for files over 5MB
Add Redis-based caching layer for the product catalog API
Fix email notification templates not rendering user names correctly
Implement role-based access control with admin/editor/viewer roles
Fix race condition in inventory decrement causing overselling
